     the Fermi energy is    -0.5447 ev

!    total energy              =   -7323.98902816 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <          4.6E-09 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.18951849 Ry
     internal energy E=F+TS    =   -7323.79950967 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -150233.03030214 Ry
     hartree contribution      =   75817.25120154 Ry
     xc contribution           =   -2813.77309674 Ry
